description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 2 hrs 38 mins of coding time, averaging 2 hrs 26 mins per day. His activity was spread across 5 projects, with most time spent in TypeScript, followed by JSON, JavaScript, and Java. No GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories were recorded in the data.
